titleStmt.title: SII 11.76: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 76. (B.K. No. 2 of 1926-27). GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB BUILT INTO THE prākāra OF THE TRIKŪṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription which is considerably damaged and mutilated refers to one Mādhava and his son (?) Kēsa[va ?]-Jīya (also probably called Kēsavarāja). The latter appears to have fought successful battles in the Koṅkaṇa country and on the banks of the Gōdāvarī and won the admiration of Taila (Nūrmaḍi-Taila II) and also pleased Vikramāditya (probably Vikramāditya V) by his conquest of the Kōsala country. Among his sons by Lāḻāṁbikā or Lāḷāṁbikā, were Bhāyiga, who pleased the same king by his conquests and Mādhavarāja who won the admiration of Siṅga-nṛipati (probably Jayasiṁha II) by leading the cavalry forces (in the wars) against the Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nudāttaṁ
gaḷanotti khaṇmune khaṇillene kōpadinōḍe poyle
ḷvena sūva kayyuga mudāttammādhavaṁ dhāriṇīnuta vīrabrati kēsa
jīyana kūsutanadoḷe nijarārājitatējaṁ kēsavarājaṁ rājādhikaṁ
gūrjjanandina parākramamaṁ nenedemmameynacinnindappavogaḷāḷore
ndidaḷava kuḷarakṣara sa vārivarggadamanevakaḷaṁ
nta bīradoḷ bariyutamippa gōpatiya saṁbunandana rūḍivetta śaṁkarana .
calanaṁ tāḷdilūrikkidanu ṟi mallapana talegi
ḷe duṣkirātaranoḷgundadoḷe veḍeyoḷ dōrggarbbadiṁkoṁkaṇa
gōdāvari yā muṇḍaṁriṣipoḷaloḷe paṟidu puḷana balamuṭṭe
vanadanāvāsavanāgiḻda tailanē mmeccidano . vṛtta .
kramādityana viditaṁ rājyavibhūtiyoḷe niḻisi tatpādābjada
kōsaḷeyaṁ daṇḍina dhāḷiyiṁ tuḷida durllaṁghyamāgiḻdaṁ
svarūpakanā varājanuṁ mikkasāhasāvaḷigaḷa ni
ritacaritaṁ patimeccegaṇḍanaṁ . vṛtta . vyāptiyoḷiḻdarundhati
kakṣiti saṁcāriṇi lakṣmiyō rājaṁgaṁ lāḻāṁbikā yaṁ . bhuva
tyarppuṭṭidarssanda pāṇḍavarī kēśirājavibhugaṁ lāḷāṁbikā
meccisidaṁ . vṛtta . bhavakōpaṁ paḷeya
nevaneṁbantire bhāyiganumaṁ
riyādudattalaṟiyaṭṭidanunmu
ṇnalanu manō re tandu vikramāditya
remā ḻdarighaṭāmallaṅgamumalla nāvanohuṁ purcce
kaṇmuṭṭiṇmuṭṭāgire poṇmuvamuḷisintaguḷdu mādhavarāja
yamaṁ māḍaloḍaṁ poḻanāda siṅganṛpatige meṟeda
ḍadalli dāsuganu tuṅgaturagadhaḷaṁ nūṁkuva
diṁdārddette cōḷānmuga balamanentu koṅgavāḷe cōḷiga
Digital edition of SII 11.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
